mapper.sql: id, username, password, phone, email, real_name, gender, birthday, avatar, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from t_user order by id desc
mapper.update: update t_user set username = #{et.username}, password = #{et.password}, phone = #{et.phone}, email = #{et.email}, real_name = #{et.realName}, gender = #{et.gender}, birthday = #{et.birthday}, avatar = #{et.avatar}, status = #{et.status}, create_time = #{et.createTime}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} where id = #{et.id}
